mapper.sql: id, title, summary, content, content_html, cover_image, user_id, author_name, category_id, status, publish_time, read_count, like_count, comment_count, collection_count, share_count, top, recommended, visible, allow_comment, allow_forward, original, original_url, last_edit_time,create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time
mapper.select:
select
from article where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, summary, content, content_html, cover_image, user_id, author_name, category_id, status, publish_time, read_count, like_count, comment_count, collection_count, share_count, top, recommended, visible, allow_comment, allow_forward, original, original_url, last_edit_time,create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{contentHtml}, #{coverImage}, #{userId}, #{authorName}, #{categoryId}, #{status}, #{publishTime}, #{readCount}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{collectionCount}, #{shareCount}, #{top}, #{recommended}, #{visible}, #{allowComment}, #{allowForward}, #{original}, #{originalUrl}, #{lastEditTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted}, #{deletedTime})
mapper.delete: update article set deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.title, a.content, a.content_html, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.status, a.visible, a.allow_comment, a.allow_forward, a.original, a.original_url, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.collection_count, a.share_count, a.user_id as user_id, a.author_name, u.avatar, u.article_count, u.follow_count, u.follower_count, a.category_id, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.author_name, a.category_id, u.avatar, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status IN (1,2) ORDER BY a.read_count DESC, a.like_count DESC, a.comment_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.author_name, a.category_id, u.avatar, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status IN (1, 2) ORDER BY a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.author_name, a.category_id, u.avatar, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status IN (1, 2) AND a.cover_image IS NOT NULL AND a.cover_image != '' ORDER BY a.top DESC, a.recommended DESC, a.read_count DESC, a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.author_name, a.category_id, u.avatar, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.status IN (1, 2) ORDER BY a.top DESC, a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) FROM article a WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.status IN (1, 2)

SELECT a.id, a.title, a.summary, a.cover_image, a.status, a.visible, a.publish_time, a.last_edit_time, a.read_count, a.like_count, a.comment_count, a.user_id, a.author_name, a.category_id, u.avatar, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN user u ON a.user_id = u.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.id != #{excludeArticleId} AND a.status IN (1, 2) ORDER BY a.top DESC, a.publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET read_count = read_count + #{increment} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE article SET like_count = like_count + #{offset} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE article SET comment_count = comment_count + #{offset} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE article SET collection_count = collection_count + #{offset} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE article SET share_count = share_count + #{offset} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT read_count FROM article WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT like_count FROM article WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT comment_count FROM article WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT collection_count FROM article WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT share_count FROM article WHERE id = #{articleId} AND deleted = 0
